authorization_phrase: Authorize s20-d1 combined-universe weekly relative-strength rotation DRAFT-to-diagnostic bundle (Step 3: P2 phase-2 plan).

c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C1_live_mode_refusal: Algo.Initialize raises if LiveMode detected; paper-only forever
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C2_engine_truth_run_id: deterministic run_id over (tier_spec_seal + plan_lock_seal + plan_doc_sha + phase_tag + algo_version + engine dates); engine-truth date cross-check at Initialize
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C3_safety_counters: set-membership safety counters; all-zero rollup; extended_hours_fill NOT_APPLICABLE (daily bars)
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C4_boundary_alignment: US equity RTH; eod_cancel 16:00 ET; daily-bar trivial; WEEKLY rebalance on the scheduled trading day (R=5)
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C5_corporate_action_handling: CASH-EQUITY split_only on the 48-name union: s18 splits (AAPL/NVDA/AMZN/WMT/GOOGL + MRK 1.048 spinoff) + s19 (NFLX 10:1 2025-11-17 + HON 1.061 spinoff 2025-10-30) applied+verified; dividends NOT adjusted; DR9 PASSED all 48 (d86e5d1 + 574fa9e); no fetch; calendar alignment across both data dirs asserted at BUILD
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C6_inherited_constraints: 16-entry inherited_constraints_block carried verbatim from SEAL (K9 inviolate + pre-SEAL K9 MEASURED-PASS incl OOS 134/67.2y + K13 binding + FRESH-combined-universe-not-revN + edge-not-inherited + SELECTION-bias caveat binding + L/S/M/R=126/21/8/5 locked + DR10 v2 counter-pressure + split_only + 48-name union locked + ...)
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C7_verdict_closed_enum: READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST / INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / FAIL_SAFETY / REJECT_FAST / INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD / OOS_NOT_ROBUST / OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC; OOS_NOT_ROBUST = K13 (P6.7) fail
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C8_lifecycle_states: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE; PAUSED; BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED; no_strategy_optimization; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal; walk_forward_k13_binding; selection_caveat_binding

edge_not_inherited_note: edge re-proven at P6 IS; selection caveat binding
inherited_constraints_block_C6_carried_v: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades>=100 total; OOS>=50/y; no relaxation. Pre-SEAL K9 turnover MEASURED (signal-only, no P&L, 48-name union) PASSES: IS aggregate 284; OOS 134 (67.2/y) CLEARS the floor; per-fold F1-F5 77/96/81/77/84 (agg 415).

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-ref 52a3b60): >=3/5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds positive + aggregate net>0 + K9; P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Folds LOCKED at DA22.

FRESH s20 CANDIDATE (NOT a tune/_revN_ of s18 or s19): mechanic byte-identical to the s18/s19 weekly spec; the ONLY change is the universe (48-name union of two pre-committed DR9-passed baskets). s18 (7e6aa36) and s19 (a3aed99) frozen/untouched. M=8 unchanged.

EDGE NOT INHERITED: the combined-basket edge MUST be re-proven from scratch at s20 P6 IS (K1 sharpe>0 AND K2 expectancy>0), P6.7 K13, and P10 OOS. A null/negative result = accepted, informative (breadth did not yield a surviving edge).

SELECTION-BIAS CAVEAT (BINDING interpretation rule): the 48-name union INCLUDES the known-OOS-CONFIRMED s18 basket, so a positive s20 IS/OOS is WEAK fresh-generalization evidence. s20's honest value is the SAMPLE-SIZE (OOS-K9-reachability-via-breadth) question, NOT independent edge generalization. Read all downstream positive results through this caveat.

PURPOSE = SAMPLE-SIZE FIX: broadening the ranking pool to 48 at fixed M=8 raises boundary churn -> more OOS turnover. Pre-SEAL MEASURED OOS 134 (67.2/y) confirms breadth STRUCTURALLY SOLVES the s19 OOS-K9 blocker (s19 was 43.6/y terminal). Binding confirmation with P&L at P10.
RELATIVE-STRENGTH-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): weekly cadence; 126-21 ranking signal; top-8 equal-weight; relative-rank exit (no trailing/ATR stop). Identical to s18/s19.
Params L=126 / S=21 / M=8 / R=5(weekly) LOCKED byte-equivalent (identical to s18/s19; NOT tuned, NOT searched). M held at 8 (NOT scaled to 16) -> breadth effect from universe size alone.
DA3 equal-weight 1/M; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).

DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-ref 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal. COUNTER-PRESSURE: more turnover raises cost_drag (~1-3% projected vs <1% parents); DR10-v2 binding at P6.5; REJECT_FAST a more live possibility than the 24-name parents.

split_only CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse the DR9-passed CSVs of BOTH baskets (d86e5d1 + 574fa9e); switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN; s18 splits (AAPL/NVDA/AMZN/WMT/GOOGL + MRK 1.048) + s19 (NFLX 10:1 + HON 1.061) applied+verified.
48-name COMBINED UNION universe LOCKED (24 s18 + 24 s19; zero overlap); widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).

DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 48 by sealed results d86e5d1 (s18, 85667ab3238a27b2) + 574fa9e (s19, 0c8e21f240c8b801); cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent; sha-verified all 48 at the DRAFT measurement.
A7 + K10 + K6 LOAD-BEARING (top-8 of 48 -> broad sector spread, more diversified than the 24-name parents); NOT the risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: byte-locked s18/s19 params, NOT grid-searched/tuned; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched; no cadence-tuning; no held-N change.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.
no_automatic_build_or_run: P3 BUILD authored next in this bundle; no test run + no real CSV at P3 (P4 runs synthetic tests; P6 reads real CSV).

build_creates: runner harness (main.py): CONFIG byte-equivalent to SEAL DA register (weekly R=5, top-8, 48-name union); cross-sectional RS primitives (trailing_return 126-21; cross_sectional_rank; select_top_M=8; equal_weight_targets 1/M; is_rebalance_bar R=5; rotation_exits/entries; commission_cost; slippage_cost); long-only; QC-compat shim; data_csv_registry merges BOTH dirs (s17-broad dir for s18 names + s19 dir for s19 names) with 48 SHAs
in_sample_driver.py: 48-CSV registry across both dirs; IS 2019-01-02..2023-12-29; run_in_sample() STUB raising P6_IS_NOT_AUTHORIZED
walk_forward_driver.py [K13]: the 5 DA22 pre-committed UNSEARCHED folds (warmup 0-159; F1 160-478..F5 1436-1758); run_walk_forward() STUB raising P6_7_K13_NOT_AUTHORIZED; no per-fold refit
out_of_sample_driver.py: OOS 2024-01-02..2025-12-30; run_out_of_sample() STUB raising P10_OOS_NOT_AUTHORIZED; OOS isolation
execution_guard.py: full_guard_check + assert_* (assert_weekly_cadence; assert_k13_fold_scheme_locked; assert_no_per_fold_refit; assert_calendar_aligned_48; live refusal)
tests/test_smoke.py + tests/conftest.py: synthetic fixtures only (T1..T24); pinned rootdir/confcutdir + -p no:cacheprovider
synthetic fixture CSVs (NOT real market data)
3 sealed build reports (build manifest + harness attestation + test-plan)
p3_build_scope_defined.calendar_alignment_precondition: BUILD asserts all 48 CSVs share the 1759-bar calendar (verified at DRAFT measurement); misalignment -> BUILD HALT, not silent reindex

preseal_k9_gate_carried: MEASURED-PASS (signal-only): IS 284 / OOS 134 (67.2/y); breadth solves the s19 OOS-K9 blocker
rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 >=50/y. Pre-SEAL OOS turnover MEASURED 134 (67.2/y) clears; TRUE OOS K9 (with P&L) confirmed only at P10; the chain shall NOT relax K9.
